equity_etfs.name: S&P 500
equity_etfs.description: Tracks 500 large U.S. companies across all sectors, with heavy weights in Apple, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Amazon, Alphabet, Meta, Berkshire Hathaway, and JPMorgan Chase. Learn More

equity_etfs.name: Vanguard Tech
equity_etfs.description: Large-cap U.S. tech stocks, concentrated in NVIDIA, Apple, Microsoft, Broadcom, and Advanced Micro Devices, plus other software and semiconductor names. Learn More

equity_etfs.name: Energy Sector
equity_etfs.description: U.S. energy majors focused on oil and gas, led by Exxon Mobil, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, Williams Companies, SLB, Phillips 66, Valero, Marathon Petroleum, and Baker Hughes. Learn More

equity_etfs.name: Vanguard Energy
equity_etfs.description: Broad U.S. energy basket including Exxon Mobil, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, Williams Companies, Marathon Petroleum, EOG Resources, Phillips 66, Valero, Kinder Morgan, and Baker Hughes. Learn More

equity_etfs.name: Oil & Gas E&P
equity_etfs.description: Equal-weighted U.S. oil and gas exploration and production names such as Texas Pacific Land, Venture Global, Exxon Mobil, California Resources, Occidental, Chevron, Ovintiv, Permian Resources, Magnolia Oil & Gas, and Coterra Energy. Learn More

bond_etfs.name: iShares 20+ Treasuries
bond_etfs.description: Portfolio of long-term U.S. Treasury bonds, including issues like U.S. Treasury 2.0% 2051, 1.875% 2051, 4.125% 2053, 4.25% 2054, and 3.625% 2053, with maturities beyond 20 years. Learn More

bond_etfs.name: Vanguard Extended Treasuries
bond_etfs.description: Long-duration U.S. Treasury STRIPS created from Treasury bonds with maturities typically 20-30+ years, giving very high sensitivity to long-term U.S. government bond yields. Learn More
